title: Keep register-user domain types pure
scenario: Domain types should not depend on HTTP, JSON, databases, or logging setup. Start with pure command and value-object types.
instructions: Define a domain module with EmailAddress and RegisterUserCommand. Keep fields private and expose borrowed accessors.

hints.body: Keep the Register user use case boundaries code active and define a domain module with EmailAddress and RegisterUserCommand. Keep fields private and expose borrowed accessors.
Use the Rust API named in this lesson instead of adding a side helper; the previous arc code should stay in the main solution.
One complete solution for Keep register-user domain types pure is shown below.

completionExplanation: Keep register-user domain types pure now extends the active Register user use case boundaries code with register domain command. The previous lesson's behavior remains in the main solution rather than an archived module.
